nodes.label: Alice Chen
nodes.desc: Senior ML Engineer at NeuroSys. Expert in graph neural networks, transformer architectures, and retrieval-augmented generation pipelines.

nodes.label: Bob Ramos
nodes.desc: Lead Data Scientist at VectorDB Inc. Specialises in vector embeddings, ANN algorithms, and hybrid search systems.

nodes.label: Carol Lee
nodes.desc: Research Scientist at NeuroSys. Published 12 papers on knowledge graph construction, entity resolution, and ontology engineering.

nodes.label: Dave Patel
nodes.desc: Principal AI Architect at DataBridge. Leads the enterprise GraphRAG platform team.

nodes.label: Eve Nakamura
nodes.desc: Backend Engineer at VectorDB Inc. Builds high-performance distributed graph query engines.

nodes.label: Frank Torres
nodes.desc: DevRel Engineer at DataBridge. Creates tutorials and demos for the GraphRAG developer community.

nodes.label: Grace Kim
nodes.desc: Research Director at NeuroSys. Oversees all AI research projects. PhD in Computational Linguistics from MIT.

nodes.label: NeuroSys
nodes.desc: AI research company focused on neuro-symbolic reasoning and knowledge graph-powered AI systems. Founded 2019, Series B.

nodes.label: VectorDB Inc.
nodes.desc: Database company specialising in hybrid vector + graph storage. Supports 10B+ vectors with graph traversal.

nodes.label: DataBridge
nodes.desc: Enterprise data platform building graph-native AI applications. Fortune 500 customers in finance and healthcare.

nodes.label: GraphRAG
nodes.desc: Graph Retrieval Augmented Generation. Uses knowledge graph traversal to enrich LLM context. Dramatically reduces hallucination vs vector-only RAG.

nodes.label: Neo4j
nodes.desc: World's leading graph database. Cypher query language, native graph storage, built-in vector search.

nodes.label: LangChain
nodes.desc: Framework for building LLM-powered apps. GraphRAG chains available via Neo4j integration.

nodes.label: TensorFlow
nodes.desc: Google's open-source ML framework. Used for training graph neural network models at NeuroSys.

nodes.label: LlamaIndex
nodes.desc: Data framework for LLM apps. KnowledgeGraphIndex enables property graph-based retrieval.

nodes.label: Pinecone
nodes.desc: Managed vector database. Used alongside Neo4j in hybrid retrieval pipelines.

nodes.label: Project Atlas
nodes.desc: Internal R&D project at NeuroSys + DataBridge: building a production GraphRAG search assistant.

nodes.label: Project Mercury
nodes.desc: Real-time knowledge graph ingestion pipeline. Processes 50K documents/hour.

nodes.label: Project Nexus
nodes.desc: Open-source GraphRAG benchmark suite comparing retrieval quality across graph, vector, and hybrid approaches.

nodes.label: Vector RAG
nodes.desc: Traditional RAG using vector similarity search. Fast but lacks structural reasoning.

nodes.label: Knowledge Graph
nodes.desc: Graph-structured knowledge: entities + relationships + properties. Foundation of GraphRAG.
